referrals.title: Referrals
referrals.linkCard.title: Your Referral Link
referrals.linkCard.hint: Share this link to earn rewards when friends join and complete their first action.
referrals.explainer.title: How the Two-Tier System Works
referrals.explainer.tier1Body: When someone signs up using your referral link and completes their first qualifying action, you earn XP and Coins.
referrals.explainer.tier2Body: When your Tier 1 referrals refer others, you earn a smaller bonus from those Tier 2 sign-ups too.
referrals.table.title: Referred Users
referrals.table.empty: No referred users yet. Share your link to get started!

elder.dashboard.noMentees: No mentees yet. Share your mentor link to attract mentees.

elder.eligibility.body: Elders are experienced members who guide newer players. You are eligible to apply!
elder.nonEligible.title: Elder System
elder.nonEligible.body: Elders are experienced Zobia members who mentor newer players. As you grow, you can become eligible to be an Elder yourself.
elder.nonEligible.step2: Stay active in the last 30 days
elder.nonEligible.wantMentorBody: Request an Elder mentor to help guide your journey on Zobia.
elder.nonEligible.requestSent: Request sent! An Elder will be assigned to you soon.

subscription.cancelledSuccess: Subscription cancelled. You'll retain access until the period ends.
subscription.finePrint: Prices are in Nigerian Naira (NGN). Subscriptions renew automatically and can be cancelled at any time. Annual plans are billed as a single payment.
